name: relay
description: Zero-custody agent commerce protocol for XRPL

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix sdk install && npm --prefix api install && npm --prefix mcp-paywall install && npm --prefix indexer install
scripts.build: npm --prefix sdk run build && npm --prefix api run build && npm --prefix mcp-paywall run build && npm --prefix indexer run build
scripts.test: npm --prefix sdk run test && npm --prefix mcp-paywall run test
